description: Drive your whole Google Workspace from the terminal — Gmail, Contacts, Drive, Sheets, Docs, Slides, Calendar, Tasks, Google Chat, plus a generic `api` passthrough to hit ANY Google API. Open source, ships with NO OAuth provider baked in: point it at your own token-broker gateway (`provider set`), buy a managed one, or — Adom staff — install the private adom-google-adom provider. One-click OAuth, no client secret on your machine. First run asks safe mode (no delete) vs full mode (incl. delete).
